# documentation.md

```md
---
name: 📚 Documentation
about: Suggest documentation improvements.
title: "[Docs]: "
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

## Documentation Issue

Describe what is missing or incorrect.

---

## Suggested Changes

Explain the documentation changes needed.

---

## Affected Sections

- README
- CONTRIBUTING
- API Documentation
- Code Comments
- Other

---

## Additional Notes

Include examples, screenshots, or references if applicable.
```

# security_issue.md

```md
---
name: 🔒 Security Issue
about: Report a potential security vulnerability.
title: "[Security]: "
labels: security
assignees: ""
---

> **Do not disclose sensitive vulnerabilities publicly.**
>
> If the issue could expose users or the project to risk, please contact the maintainers privately before opening a public issue.

## Summary

Provide a brief description of the security concern.

---

## Affected Component

- Authentication
- Authorization
- API
- Database
- Dependencies
- Infrastructure
- Other

---

## Potential Impact

Describe the potential impact if exploited.

---

## Steps to Reproduce

If safe to share, provide reproduction steps.

---

## Suggested Mitigation

Describe any recommended fixes or mitigations.

---

## Additional Information

Include references, CVEs, logs, or other relevant information.
```
